creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text: node17 has documented (vuxml) vulnerabilities < 17.3.1.  The current version in www/node is 17.0.1.  I don't know what this should be updated to.  I think I would try 17.3.1 first, but I don't have a particularly good reason for that.  But the "latest" is 18.0.0 (after progressive releases in the last few months that look like they were marching toward 18.0.0 - 17.4.0, 17.5.0, ..., 17.9,0).
